name: URACHAL ANOMALIES
definition: cystic dilatation of urachus periodically emptying into bladder / umbilicus fistula between bladder and umbilicus gradually enlarging cyst ← closure of both ends of urachus urachus communicates only with bladder dome urachus patent only at umbilicus
discriminating_features: no communication with bladder or umbilicus
thickened tubular structure with echogenic center

general: no communication with bladder or umbilicus
thickened tubular structure with echogenic center

clinical.Cx: infection (23%), intestinal obstruction, hemorrhage into cyst, peritonitis from rupture,
